name: data-engineer-plugin
description: Data engineer helpers for Claude Code. Currently ships /address-pr — a 3-phase ADO PR-review-addressing flow that parallelizes across PRs via claude-squad (triage → make+commit fixes → developer handoff; never pushes, never replies to threads). Per-PR lockfile + PreToolUse hook prevent one session from drifting into another PR's worktree. Sibling plugin to api-scraper; both can be installed together.
